exercises.title: Regulatory Requirement Mapper
exercises.description: Build a tool to map applicable regulations to an organization's profile.
tasks: Define organization profile (industry, size, federal work)
exercises.expectedOutput: Regulatory mapping tool with organization-specific requirements
hints: Industry determines which sector regs apply
FIPS always applies to federal systems

exercises.title: CNSA 2.0 Timeline Tracker
exercises.description: Create a timeline tracker for CNSA 2.0 compliance milestones.
tasks: Load CNSA 2.0 deadlines by use case
hints: Different use cases have different dates

exercises.title: Compliance Gap Analyzer
exercises.description: Build a tool to identify gaps between current state and requirements.
exercises.expectedOutput: Gap analysis tool with prioritized remediation plan

exercises.title: Regulatory Watch Dashboard
exercises.description: Design a dashboard concept for tracking regulatory changes.
tasks: Identify key regulatory sources to monitor
Define alert criteria for new requirements
hints: Monitor NIST, NSA, OMB for US federal
